name: add_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem Nat.add_comm (a b : ℕ) : a + b = b + a := by
  induction a with
  | zero =>
    simp
  | succ a ih =>
    rw [succ_eq_add_one]
    rw [add_assoc]
    rw [add_comm b 1]
    rw [←add_assoc]
    rw [ih]
    rfl
```

name: add_assoc
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem add_assoc (a b c : ℕ) : (a + b) + c = a + (b + c) := by
  induction c with
  | zero =>
    simp
  | succ k ih =>
    calc
      (a + b) + (k + 1) = ((a + b) + k) + 1 := by rfl
      _ = (a + (b + k)) + 1 := by rw [ih]
      _ = a + ((b + k) + 1) := by rfl
      _ = a + (b + (k + 1)) := by rfl
```

```lean4
lemma map_append_distrib {α β : Type} (f : α → β) (xs : List α) (ys : List α) :
  (xs ++ ys).map f = xs.map f ++ ys.map f := by
  induction xs with
  | nil =>
    simp
  | cons x xs ih =>
    simp [Map.map, ih]
    <;> rfl
```

name: list_filter_def
output:
```lean4
def filter (p : α → Bool) (xs : List α) : List α :=
  match xs with
  | [] => []
  | x :: xs' =>
    if p x then
      x :: filter p xs'
    else
      filter p xs'
```

name: and_comm
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem and_comm (P Q : Prop) : P ∧ Q ↔ Q ∧ P := by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    have h1 : P := h.1
    have h2 : Q := h.2
    exact And.intro h2 h1
  · intro h
    have h1 : Q := h.1
    have h2 : P := h.2
    exact And.intro h2 h1
```

```lean
theorem propDisjComm (P Q : Prop) : P ∨ Q ↔ Q ∨ P := by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h => right; exact h
    | inr h => left; exact h
  · intro h
    cases h with
    | inl h => right; exact h
    | inr h => left; exact h
```

name: demorgan_or
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib
import Aesop
open BigOperators
open Real
open Nat
open Topology
open Rat
theorem demorgan_law (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∨ Q) ↔ ¬P ∧ ¬Q := by
  apply Iff.intro
  ·
    intro h
    constructor
    ·
      intro hp
      apply h
      exact Or.inl hp
    ·
      intro hq
      apply h
      exact Or.inr hq
  ·
    rintro ⟨hp, hq⟩ h
    cases h with
    | inl hp' => exact hp hp'
    | inr hq' => exact hq hq'
```

name: comp_injective
output:
```lean4
import Mathlib

theorem Function.Injective.comp {α β γ : Type*} (f : α → β) (g : β → γ)
    (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (g ∘ f) := by
  intro x y hxy
  simp only [Function.comp_apply] at hxy
  apply hf
  apply hg
  exact hxy
```
